title: skills-installer registry
description: Declarative list of skills that skills-installer can fetch and install into agent skill directories.

$schema.description: Reference to the schema URL; ignored at runtime but kept for editor tooling.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier used both as the directory name inside the target skills dir and as the CLI selector for --skills=<name>.

title.description: Human-readable title shown in install summary and README tables.

upstream.description: HTTPS GitHub URL of the upstream repository to clone from in online mode.

branch.description: Branch or tag to pull. Defaults to main.

redistributable.description: Whether the skill's license allows us to mirror it inside this repo for --offline mode. If false, --offline will skip this skill with a warning and prompt the user to re-run online.

paths.description: Subpaths inside the upstream repo to copy. '.' means the entire repo. Multiple paths produce sibling directories under the target when installAs is unset, or siblings under installAs when set.

installAs.description: Optional parent directory name under the agent's skills dir. When set, every entry in paths lands under <skills>/<installAs>/<basename(path)>. When unset, each entry lands directly at <skills>/<basename(path)>.

flatten.description: When true, the copy step promotes every immediate subdirectory of the given path to top-level (used by superpowers which groups skills into architecture/, collaboration/, … categories).

tags.description: Free-form tags (document, design, meta, …) used by interactive menu filtering.
